allow: Bash(node -e "require\(''dotenv''\).config\(\); const url = new URL\(process.env.DATABASE_URL\); console.log\(''host:'', url.hostname\); console.log\(''port:'', url.port\); console.log\(''user:'', url.username\); console.log\(''pass:'', url.password\); console.log\(''db:'', url.pathname\);")
